measurement_note: Size is b, the bit length of M, for target [M, 2] with M = 2^(b-1) + 1. Modulo compresses all repeated reverse replacements and the heap method runs within O(n log n log M). A correct slower alternative undoes only one addition of the remaining sum at a time, taking Theta(M) reverse steps on these constructible targets; the calibrated largest tier needs 2048 subtractions and completes below the safety cap.

cases.name: benchmark: 3-bit largest value with remainder two
